title: Marty
tooltip: I have something to show you
welcomeMessage: I'm your smart assistant, here to help you launch campaigns, get insights and find answers. What can I help you with today?
disclaimer: This smart assistant is powered by AI. It may make mistakes or use data from outside Walmart. Never share personally sensitive info. View

campaign.title: Create campaign
campaign.name: Campaign name
campaign.expandedTargetingDesc: Choose when customers see your ads.
campaign.biddingStrategyDesc: Choose the strategy that best suits your business goals.
campaign.biddingInfo: When you switch to Dynamic or Fixed bidding we will apply the platform suggested bids to your items. You can change your bids at any time
campaign.saveReviewHint: Click "Save and review" to view item list and all campaign creation options
campaign.readyMessage: I have added your selections and your campaign is ready to launch. You can still take a moment to review your campaign and make any final changes. When you're ready, click the "Launch campaign" button in the top-right corner.
campaign.scheduledMessage: {{name}} is scheduled to start {{date}}. You can make changes anytime before it goes live.
campaign.whatCanMartyDo: What can Marty help me do on this page?
campaign.howToSetup: How do I set up a Sponsored Products campaign?
campaign.whichItems: Which items do you recommend I advertise?
